page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 2 physical cores utilizing the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The single-core CPU performance under stress-ng is strong, ranking in the top 25% with a score of 3070.98. However, due to the low core count and lack of multi-threading, the multi-core stress-ng performance is weak, falling into the bottom 25% at 3073.48. Memory bandwidth also presents a bottleneck, with cached small-block read performance rated as poor at 151.05 GB/sec, while uncached large-block write performance is average at 27.73 GB/sec.

Given its hardware profile, the ecs.g8a.large is positioned as a cost-efficient option for entry-level general-purpose workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand high multi-threaded throughput or local storage. It is suitable for lightweight web serving, basic single-threaded data processing, and development or testing environments. It is less suitable for database operations or high-concurrency applications, as indicated by its lower scores in Passmark database tests and Redis SET operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 2 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it includes 8.0 GB of RAM but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, though multi-core performance and cached memory bandwidth are relatively weak. This resource profile makes the instance a cost-efficient choice for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, small-scale web serving, and development environments that require dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of high-density multi-core configurations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, optimized for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine offering balanced memory and strong single-core performance for entry-level general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 processor at 2.7 GHz
Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong single-core CPU performance for single-threaded tasks
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for lightweight web serving and development environments
